Uses of Class
jline.lang.NetworkStruct

  • Packages that use NetworkStruct 
    Package Description
    jline.api
    This package contains most algorithms for solving stochastic models
    jline.lang
    Classes to declare basic elements of a model
    jline.lang.state
    Classes that model the state of a network and its individual nodes
    jline.solvers
    This package contains the solver superclasses and related data structures
    jline.solvers.fluid.analyzers
    Classes that embody different fluid ODE analysis algorithms
    jline.solvers.fluid.odes
    Classes that generate the ordinary differential equations (ODEs) used in the Fluid solver
    jline.solvers.jmt
    Classes that rely on the Java Modelling Tools (JMT) suite solvers
    jline.solvers.mam
    Classes that analyze networks using matrix-analytic methods
    jline.solvers.mva
    Classes that analyze networks through Mean-Value Analysis (MVA)
    jline.solvers.mva.analyzers
    Classes that embody different mean-value analysis methods
    jline.solvers.mva.handlers
    Classes for coordinate the execution and performance metric estimation in MVA-based algorithms
    jline.solvers.nc
    Classes that analyze networks using Normalizing Costant (NC) methods
    jline.solvers.ssa
    Classes that analyze networks using Stochastic Simulation Algorithm (SSA)
    jline.solvers.ssa.state  

    • Uses of NetworkStruct in jline.api

      Methods in jline.api that return NetworkStruct 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static NetworkStruct SN.snRefreshVisits​(NetworkStruct sn, Matrix chains, Matrix rt, Matrix rtnodes)
      Reculate the visits to each node
      Methods in jline.api with parameters of type NetworkStruct 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static Matrix FJ.findPaths​(NetworkStruct sn, Matrix P, int startNode, int endNode, int r, ArrayList<Integer> toMerge, Matrix QN, Matrix TN, double currentTime, Matrix fjclassmap, Matrix fjforkmap, Network nonfjmodel)
      Finds the response times along each path leading out of startNode up to (and not including) endNode
      static Map<Integer,​Map<Integer,​Map<Integer,​Matrix>>> MAM.ph_reindex​(Map<Station,​Map<JobClass,​Map<Integer,​Matrix>>> PHs, NetworkStruct sn)
      Re-indexes a collection of phase-type distributions (PHs)
      static SN.snDeaggregateChainResultsReturn SN.snDeaggregateChainResults​(NetworkStruct sn, Matrix Lchain, Matrix ST, Matrix STchain, Matrix Vchain, Matrix alpha, Matrix Qchain, Matrix Uchain, Matrix Rchain, Matrix Tchain, Matrix Cchain, Matrix Xchain)
      Calculate class-based performance metrics for a queueing network based on performance measures of its chains
      static SN.snGetDemandsChainReturn SN.snGetDemandsChain​(NetworkStruct sn)
      Calculate new queueing network parameters after aggregating classes into chains
      static SN.snGetProductFormChainParamsReturn SN.snGetProductFormChainParams​(NetworkStruct sn)
      Calculate the parameters at class and chain level for a queueing network model
      static SN.snGetProductFormChainParamsReturn SN.snGetProductFormParams​(NetworkStruct sn)
      Calculate the parameters at class level for a queueing network model
      static boolean SN.snHasClassSwitching​(NetworkStruct sn)
      Checks if the network uses class-switching
      static boolean SN.snHasForkJoin​(NetworkStruct sn)
      Checks if the network uses fork and/or join nodes
      static boolean SN.snHasHomogeneousScheduling​(NetworkStruct sn, SchedStrategy strategy)
      Checks if the network uses an identical scheduling strategy at every station
      static boolean SN.snHasLoadDependence​(NetworkStruct sn)
      Checks if the network has a station with load-dependent service process
      static boolean SN.snHasMultiClassHeterFCFS​(NetworkStruct sn)
      Checks if the network has one or more stations with multiclass heterogeneous FCFS
      static boolean SN.snHasOpenClasses​(NetworkStruct sn)
      Checks if the network has one or more open classes
      static boolean SN.snHasPriorities​(NetworkStruct sn)
      Checks if the network uses class priorities
      static boolean SN.snHasProductForm​(NetworkStruct sn)
      Checks if the network has a known product-form solution
      static boolean SN.snHasProductFormExceptMultiClassHeterExpFCFS​(NetworkStruct sn)
      Checks if the network satisfies product-form assumptions except multiclass heterogeneous FCFS
      static NetworkStruct SN.snRefreshVisits​(NetworkStruct sn, Matrix chains, Matrix rt, Matrix rtnodes)
      Reculate the visits to each node
      static FJ.FJsortForksReturn FJ.sortForks​(NetworkStruct sn, NetworkStruct nonfjstruct, Matrix fjforkmap, Matrix fjclassmap, Network nonfjmodel)
      Determines a directed acyclic graph of relationships among fork nodes.
